title: TargetOK Function
parameters: targetPos	Point expression for the target position.
description: Use TargetOK to verify that a target position and orientation can be reached before actually moving to it.  The motion trajectory to the target point is not considered.
see_also:
Returns a status indicating whether or not the PTP (Point to Point) motion from the current position to a target position is possible.

CurPos, FindPos, InPos, WaitPos

TargetOK Function Example

If TargetOK(P1) Then

		  Go P1

		EndIf

		If TargetOK(P10 /L /F) Then

		  Go P10 /L /F

		EndIf
examples:
If TargetOK(P1) Then
		  Go P1
		EndIf
		If TargetOK(P10 /L /F) Then
		  Go P10 /L /F
		EndIf
